scripts.build:js: bun build src/main.ts --outfile dist/weapons-bundle.min.js --minify --target browser && bun build src/spells-main.ts --outfile dist/spells-bundle.min.js --minify --target browser && bun build src/rings-main.ts --outfile dist/rings-bundle.min.js --minify --target browser && bun build src/armor-main.ts --outfile dist/armor-bundle.min.js --minify --target browser && bun build src/dashboard-main.ts --outfile dist/dashboard-bundle.min.js --minify --target browser
scripts.build:data: cp src/data/weapons.json dist/weapons.json && cp src/data/spells.json dist/spells.json && cp src/data/rings.json dist/rings.json && cp src/data/armor.json dist/armor.json
scripts.build:html: cp src/index.html dist/index.html && cp src/weapons.html dist/weapons.html && cp src/spells.html dist/spells.html && cp src/rings.html dist/rings.html && cp src/armor.html dist/armor.html
scripts.build: bun run lint && bun run build:css && bun run build:js && bun run build:data && bun run build:html
